author: m.kalinin
content: the signature check doesn't seem to fully prevent front-running as as soon as the builder deposit is published someone (another builder who builds a block) may create a validator deposit and include it before the builder's one

author: m.kalinin
content: Attack cost is 1 ETH, if a builder's initial deposit is 1 ETH it might be fine to leave everything as is as then incentive for such attack is almost zero

author: jih2nn
content: But the frontran validator deposit doesn't prevent the builder from being activated as long as we check its signature
